testInfo.summary:
Validates the structure of all Person API 
• Call the POST consents with all the permissions needed to access the Person API (“DAMAGES_AND_PEOPLE_PERSON_READ”, “DAMAGES_AND_PEOPLE_PERSON_POLICYINFO_READ”, “DAMAGES_AND_PEOPLE_PERSON_PREMIUM_READ”, “DAMAGES_AND_PEOPLE_PERSON_CLAIM_READ”, “RESOURCES_READ”)
• Expects 201 -  Validate Response 
• Redirect the user to authorize consent 
• Calls GET Person "/"  Endpoint 
• Expects 200 - Fetches one of the policy IDs returned 
• Calls GET Person Policy Info Endpoint 
• Expects 200 - Validate Response 
• Calls GET Person Premium  Endpoint 
• Expects 200 - Validate Response 
• Calls GET Person Claim Endpoint 
• Expects 200 - Validate Response
